### Problem Description
patched placeholder

### Your Incorrect Code
```cpp
#include <bits/stdc++.h>
using namespace std;
using ll = long long;
#define rep(i, n) for (ll(i) = 0; (i) < (n); ++(i))
#define drep(i, n) for (ll(i) = (n) - 1; (i) >= 0; --(i))

int main() {
    int n;
    cin >> n;
    vector<ll> a(n, 0);
    rep(i, n) cin >> a[i];

    // 早期リターン
    if (n == 1) {
        cout << a[0] << endl;
        return 0;
    } else if (n == 2) {
        cout << a[0] + 2 * a[1] << endl;
        return 0;
    }

    // i体目までの最大の経験値、i体目までで、odd/even回倒した場合
    vector<ll> dp_odd(n, 0), dp_even(n, 0);
    dp_odd[0] = a[0];
    dp_even[0] = 0;
    dp_odd[1] = a[1];
    dp_even[1] = a[0] + 2 * a[1];

    for (int i = 2; i < n; ++i) {
        dp_odd[i] = max(dp_odd[i - 2] + 2 * a[i], dp_even[i - 1] + a[i]);
        dp_even[i] = max(dp_even[i - 2] + a[i], dp_odd[i - 1] + 2 * a[i]);
    }
    cout << max(dp_odd[n - 1], dp_even[n - 1]) << endl;

    return 0;
}
```

Error Analysis: Line 1: Got '199999000000002', Expected '199999000099999'

### Your Task
Fix the C++ code to pass ALL test cases (including hidden ones).

### Critical Guidelines
1. Focus on algorithmic correctness - NO hard-coded values or special cases
2. Ensure proper data structures and complexity (aim for O(N log N) or better when possible)
3. Handle edge cases (empty input, single elements, max constraints)
4. Use standard C++20 features; avoid non-portable code

### Output Format
Provide ONLY the complete fixed C++ code in a single ```cpp block.
